_schema.description: Population distribution across clean energy access categories. Each unit = 1% of population. All counts must sum to 100.

fields.label: string — category name shown in legend and tooltip
fields.count: number — integer from 1 to 100; all counts must sum to 100
fields.desc: string — one-line description shown in tooltip

_schema.replace: Swap label/count/desc with your real categories. Counts must total 100. The grid is always 10x10 — each dot represents exactly one unit. For non-percentage data, normalise to 100 first.

data.label: Unreliable grid
data.desc: Grid exists but supply is intermittent

data.label: No access
data.desc: No electricity access of any kind
